preferredDeck: Harden startup recovery and refine feed layout
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Refined sidebar rows, header spacing, and feed card density for a steadier reading layout.
Hardened Freed Desktop startup recovery so background work waits for healthy renderer heartbeats before running high-risk jobs.
Search can now jump directly into profile actions from the shared command surfaces.
Deduped duplicate Instagram story captures by tightening story viewer validation and repairing media-key matches.
Fixed-height desktop feed cards and story rows keep media loads from moving scroll position.
Card density controls now drive compact, comfortable, and expansive feed layouts.
Floating menus now stay inside the viewport and scroll internally.
